notes: Checklist for future captured-building and supply-pile checks before production slot-data selection is allowed.
This file does not enable any AP locations.
The production guard must remain active until every required criterion for the relevant family has code, tests, docs, and manual playtest proof.

requiredCriteria.description: Catalog records are author-reviewed and remain disabled until selected by an explicit future option.
requiredCriteria.requiredProof: Catalog validation passes with approved_disabled entries and no derived runtime-key/AP-ID drift.

requiredCriteria.description: Runtime can identify the authored object without fragile object-name guessing.
requiredCriteria.requiredProof: Runtime test or playtest log proves selected map object identity resolves to the expected runtime key.

requiredCriteria.description: Runtime has an event source that can complete the selected location family.
requiredCriteria.requiredProof: Completion event writes the selected runtime key and rejects unselected runtime keys.

requiredCriteria.description: Mission restart/replay preserves completed state and cannot duplicate AP completions.
requiredCriteria.requiredProof: Replay test proves duplicate events are idempotent and persisted state survives mission reset.

requiredCriteria.description: Bridge translates only selected runtime keys from verified slot data.
requiredCriteria.requiredProof: Bridge test proves selected keys translate, unknown keys fail, and future state arrays do not imply AP completion.

requiredCriteria.description: AP generation has an explicit option or preset path that selects future-family locations.
requiredCriteria.requiredProof: AP generation smoke proves selected future-family locations are fillable only when the option/preset enables them.

requiredCriteria.description: Production guard is removed or narrowed only for the implemented family after all other proofs exist.
requiredCriteria.requiredProof: Regression test proves production slot data still rejects any unimplemented future family.

requiredCriteria.description: One real mission playtest completes one selected check in the family and survives restart/replay.
requiredCriteria.requiredProof: Manual note records map, runtime key, AP location ID, restart result, and bridge submission result.

familySpecificProof: Capture event fires only when player captures the authored building/objective.
Pre-captured-building AP items do not complete the AP location by themselves.
Destroyed, scripted, or unreachable capturable buildings are rejected during author review.
Collected amount or depletion progress is tracked for the authored pile.
Threshold completions are monotonic one-shot events.
Replay cannot farm already-completed threshold checks.
